S.FORM: = Hiyi mu = Hiyi mu hiyi mu hiyi mu niqan tunux rmnglung dowriq qmita muhing smknux birac qmbahang quwaq o emduwa rmngaw mi mkan baga baga phuya su hug? qaqay qaqay musa suinu hug?
S.PHON: = ħiji mu = ħiji mu ħiji mu ħiji mu niqan tunux ɾmŋluŋ dowɾiq qmita muħiŋ smknux biɾaʦ qmbaħaŋ quwaq o əmduwa ɾmŋaw mi mkan baga baga pħuja su ħug? qaqaj qaqaj musa suinu ħug?
S.FORM: = Hiyi mu = Hiyi mu hiyi mu hiyi mu niqan tunux rmnglung dowriq qmita muhing smknux birac qmbahang quwaq o emduwa rmngaw mi mkan baga baga phuya su hug? qaqay qaqay musa suinu hug?
S.PHON: = ħiji mu = ħiji mu ħiji mu ħiji mu niqan tunux ɾmŋluŋ dowɾiq qmita muħiŋ smknux biɾaʦ qmbaħaŋ quwaq o əmduwa ɾmŋaw mi mkan baga baga pħuja su ħug? qaqaj qaqaj musa suinu ħug?
